p1_issues.title: [Feature]: Unified Notification Center
p1_issues.author: SiinXu
p1_issues.detail: Formal P1 planned feature — persistent notification center (system events, usage alerts, official announcements) with OS-level toast, unread badge, 30-day retention. Milestone v2.4.0.

p1_issues.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays the last line
p1_issues.author: lsy08
p1_issues.detail: Streaming bug: mimo-v2-flash only shows last token in rotating display. 8 comments. Last updated 2026-03-19 — no assignee, no fix in progress.

p1_issues.title: [Bug]: Azure OpenAI defaults to responses API instead of chat/completions — Resource not found 404
p1_issues.author: simplezhao
p1_issues.detail: Regression from v1.7.19→v1.7.22: Azure deployments hit /responses endpoint instead of /chat/completions. ERR 404 for all Azure gpt-5.2 users. Assigned to DeJeune but no fix merged. 4 reactions.

security_alerts.title: [Bug]: MCP OAuth callback accepts first code without state validation
security_alerts.detail: OAuth CSRF attack vector: state parameter not validated before token exchange in MCP OAuth callback. Fix PR #15388 open — needs merge.

inferred_high_priority.title: [Bug] v1.9.7 Windows x64 portable ships ARM64 native module (registry.node), breaking OpenClaw entirely
inferred_high_priority.priority_signal: CRITICAL: ships-broken — ARM64 registry.node in x64 portable → ERR_DLOPEN_FAILED → IPC broken → MemoryService crash. Affects all Windows x64 portable users on v1.9.7.
